_note: D365 Sales records for Copilot Cowork + Copilot for Sales demos. Aligns with the Apex Manufacturing story.

accounts.name: Adatum Corp
accounts.description: Large manufacturing company evaluating Apex automation solutions. Existing ProLine S customer with high satisfaction. Currently in active evaluation for ProLine X platform expansion across North American plants.

accounts.description: Existing ProLine S customer. Strong candidate for ProLine X upgrade. $1.8M pipeline.

contacts.description: Key decision maker at Adatum Corp. Values speed to value and ROI. Budget authority for manufacturing automation investments.
Technical evaluator at Adatum Corp. Influences vendor selection on technical merit. Led the ProLine S pilot evaluation.
Main contact at Contoso Manufacturing. Oversaw ProLine S deployment. Interested in upgrading to ProLine X.
AI-first mindset. Evaluating ProLine X for greenfield smart manufacturing initiative.

opportunities.name: Adatum Corp - ProLine X Platform Deployment
opportunities.description: Full ProLine X platform deployment across Adatum North American plants. Includes platform license ($1.2M), implementation services ($480K), annual support ($240K), and IoT sensor package ($480K). Competitive against Fabrikam and Northwind Industrial. Meeting scheduled Thursday to present proposal.

notes.subject: January 15 meeting notes - Adatum Corp
notes.body:
Met with Lisa Chen (VP Procurement) and Marcus Webb (Dir Ops) at Adatum Corp.

Key takeaways:
- Committed to a pilot if we can demonstrate 15% throughput improvement (our ProLine S data shows 18.3%)
- Lisa is the decision maker, Marcus influences technical evaluation
- Budget cycle: must commit by end of Q2 (June 30) or rolls to next fiscal year
- Asked about our Azure IoT partnership - should highlight in proposal
- Currently evaluating Fabrikam and Northwind Industrial as alternatives

Next steps: Prepare formal proposal and schedule follow-up for late April.

notes.subject: Adatum Corp $50M smart manufacturing investment
notes.body: Adatum Corp announced a $50M investment in smart manufacturing across North American plants. Their CTO is pushing AI-first vendor selection. Our ProLine X AI/ML capabilities should resonate strongly. Great timing with the Thursday meeting.

opportunities.name: Contoso Manufacturing - ProLine X Upgrade
opportunities.description: Upgrade from ProLine S to ProLine X. Contoso is an existing satisfied customer. Strong reference potential for Adatum deal.

opportunities.name: Tailspin Industries - Smart Manufacturing Initiative
opportunities.description: Greenfield ProLine X deployment for Tailspin's new smart manufacturing initiative. CTO Raj Patel has AI-first mandate.
